heading: Murder by a Federal prisoner
label: 1118 Murder by a Federal prisoner
notes: CodificationAnother section 1118 was renumbered .section 1122 of this title

children.heading: .—Offense
children.label: a .—Offense
children.text: A person who, while confined in a Federal correctional institution under a sentence for a term of life imprisonment, commits the murder of another shall be punished by death or by life imprisonment.

children.heading: .—Definitions
children.label: b .—Definitions
children.text: In this section—“Federal correctional institution” means any Federal prison, Federal correctional facility, Federal community program center, or Federal halfway house.“murder” means a first degree or second degree murder (as defined in section 1111).“term of life imprisonment” means a sentence for the term of natural life, a sentence commuted to natural life, an indeterminate term of a minimum of at least fifteen years and a maximum of life, or an unexecuted sentence of death.
